confirmed.title: Email Verified
confirmed.body: Your email is verified — you now have full access to Community, agent contact, and trials.
error.title: Couldn't Verify
idle.title: Verify Your Email
idle.body: Click below to confirm this is really your VisaClear account email.
signin.title: Sign In to Verify
signin.body: Sign in to the account that requested this verification to confirm it.
banner.title: Verify your email address
banner.body: Check your inbox for the link we sent you. You'll need it to post in Community, contact agents, or start a paid trial.
